articles.title: Big Pharma Systematically Suppresses Anti-Inflammatory Superfoods to Protect Trillion-Dollar Drug Markets
articles.summary: Medical-pharmaceutical complex deliberately dismisses and suppresses turmeric's proven anti-inflammatory properties targeting multiple disease pathways because curcuminoids cannot be patented for massive profits. articles.title: Hemp Medicine Criminalized for 90 Years — DuPont's Corporate War Against Natural Healing
articles.summary: Hemp was systematically outlawed in 1937 not for health concerns but because synthetic fiber corporations like DuPont saw it as competition. The 1970 Controlled Substances Act falsely classified hemp as Schedule I with 'no accepted medical use' — a deliberate lie to protect corporate interests.
